title: b10052
description: hexagon: L2 cache handling rework (dirty bit tracking with lazy flushing) and more MUL_MAT updates ( #25762 ) hex-mm: fix artificial limit in the solver that restricted number of act-prep threads hex-mm: fix warning hex-prof: do not apply --top to the timeline report hmx-mm: add suport for tiled act-processing to better distribute hvx work hex-l2: add tracing for l2flush events workqueue: redo the legacy workpool api to match hmx-queue and dma-queue hmx-mm: fix f32 activation buffer alignmnet fo

title: b10051
description: kleidiai: Add SME vs SME2 distinction in kernel dispatch ( #25478 ) The current integration treats SME as a single capability (CPU_FEATURE_SME) with no distinction between SME(v1) and SME2. The kernels dispatched under CPU_FEATURE_SME use SME2-specific instructions, making dispatch incorrect on SME(v1)-only hardware. We introduce build-time and runtime distinction between SME and SME2, and wire SME(v1) and SME2 kernels based on actual hardware support. Website: https://llama.app macOS/iOS: macOS
